meta.title: NFPA 170 Fire Safety Symbols — Drawing Symbol Reference
meta.description: Standard symbols for fire alarm system drawings and floor plans. Essential for CAD/design software.
meta.standard: NFPA 170 — Standard for Fire Safety and Emergency Symbols
meta.notes: NFPA 170 defines symbols used on fire alarm shop drawings. All design software must use these symbols.

initiating_device_symbols.name: Smoke Detector (Spot Type)
initiating_device_symbols.symbol_description: Circle with dot in center or triangular shape pointing up

initiating_device_symbols.name: Heat Detector (Fixed Temperature)
initiating_device_symbols.symbol_description: Circle with H or HT inside

initiating_device_symbols.name: Heat Detector (Rate-of-Rise)
initiating_device_symbols.symbol_description: Circle with ROR or rate symbol inside

initiating_device_symbols.name: Multi-Criteria Detector
initiating_device_symbols.symbol_description: Circle with MC or triangle with internal detail

initiating_device_symbols.name: Beam Smoke Detector
initiating_device_symbols.symbol_description: Line between Tx and Rx units with label

initiating_device_symbols.name: Duct Smoke Detector
initiating_device_symbols.symbol_description: Detector symbol on duct with sampling tube notation

initiating_device_symbols.name: Manual Pull Station / Call Point
initiating_device_symbols.symbol_description: Small square with fire icon or MCP label

initiating_device_symbols.name: Gas Detector (CO/Combustible)
initiating_device_symbols.symbol_description: Circle with GAS or CO label

notification_device_symbols.name: Horn-Strobe Combination
notification_device_symbols.symbol_description: Circle with combined horn and flash icon

notification_device_symbols.name: Speaker-Strobe Combination
notification_device_symbols.symbol_description: Circle with speaker and flash icon

panel_and_equipment_symbols.name: Fire Alarm Control Panel (FACP)
panel_and_equipment_symbols.symbol_description: Rectangle with FACP or FACU label

panel_and_equipment_symbols.name: Monitor Input Module
panel_and_equipment_symbols.symbol_description: Small diamond or square with MM label

panel_and_equipment_symbols.name: Control Relay Module
panel_and_equipment_symbols.symbol_description: Small diamond or square with CM or RM label

panel_and_equipment_symbols.name: Short-Circuit Isolator
panel_and_equipment_symbols.symbol_description: Small circle with ISO label or X

wiring_symbols.name: Class B Wiring (Single Path)
wiring_symbols.line_style: Solid line with EOL at end

zone_and_label_symbols.name: Zone Boundary/Label
zone_and_label_symbols.description: Dashed boundary line with zone number and label

zone_and_label_symbols.name: Device Tag / Schedule Number
zone_and_label_symbols.description: Each device on drawing should have a tag number referencing the device schedule
zone_and_label_symbols.example: SD-001 (Smoke Detector 001), HS-001 (Horn Strobe 001), PS-001 (Pull Station 001)

title_block: Drawing title (Fire Alarm Floor Plan — Level X)
legend: All symbols used on the drawing
schedules: Device schedule (all devices listed with tag, type, manufacturer, model, zone)
